content.explanation:
🌐 What is HTML?

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the foundation of every website on the internet.

It is used to structure content like headings, paragraphs, images, and links.

Think of HTML as the skeleton of a website — it holds everything in place.

🏗️ Simple Analogy

  • 🏠 HTML = structure (walls, rooms)
  • 🎨 CSS = design (colors, styles)
  • ⚙️ JavaScript = behavior (interactions, logic)

Without HTML, a website has no structure at all.
content.syntax_breakdown:
🧱 How HTML Works

HTML uses tags written inside angle brackets like this:

<tag>Content</tag>

Most elements have:

  • Opening tag: starts the element
  • Closing tag: ends the element

Example:

<h1>Hello World</h1>
<p>This is a paragraph</p>

The browser reads this and turns it into a visible webpage.

quiz_engine.question: What is the main purpose of HTML?
options: To design how a website looks (colors and styling)
To structure and organize content on a webpage
To create animations and game logic
quiz_engine.explanation_feedback: Correct 🎉 HTML is used to structure content. CSS handles design and JavaScript handles logic and interaction.

takeaways: HTML is the structure of all websites

It uses tags like

and

to organize content
Every tag usually has an opening and closing part
Without HTML, a webpage cannot exist

cheat_sheet.html_definition: HTML is the language used to structure web pages
